/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/mouse_cursor_icon.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ui/app_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ui/medical.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ui/ui_font.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/core/app_state.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/core/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/core/user_data.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/net/cJSON.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/net/net_server.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/net/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/net/udp_discover.c.o -o /mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/2_文件IO/04-LVGL/ubuntu_demo/bin/main   -L/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/2_文件IO/04-LVGL/ubuntu_demo/.  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/2_文件IO/04-LVGL/ubuntu_demo/. lib/liblvgl.a lvgl/liblvgl_examples.a lvgl/liblvgl_demos.a lvgl/liblvgl_thorvg.a -L   -lSDL2 -lm -lpthread freetype-2.13.3/libfreetype.a -lSDL2 lib/liblvgl.a
